basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years of age who have completed M.Sc in Optometry are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow vacancies. The application process for AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 is being conducted through offline mode, and candidates can submit their application form until 06 June 2026. Candidates

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for candidates is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per government rules.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
